name: Sleep Calculator
desc: Sleep Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
description: Calculate recommended sleep hours by age.
seo_description: Use our free sleep calculator to quickly estimate cama_6, cama_5 based on hora_despertar. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculate sleep recommendation for 30 year old.
result_context: Each opción represents cicthe of sleep completos (90min); 6 cicthe (9h) is optimal to recovery maximum.
formula_display: Hour cama = hour despertar - (cicthe × 1.5h) - 15min (time conciliar sleep)
steps: Each cycle of sleep lasts 90 minutes
Resta 15 minutes additional to conciliar sleep
Choose hour that permita 5-6 cicthe to rest optimal
mistakes: Acostarse exactamente a the hour calculada (takes 15min dormir)
Dormir in exceso (>10h) regularmente (asociado a problemas health)
Use alarmas of sleep in apps without validación científica
